dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses trend-following principle: ADX_14 > 25 confirms trend presence; price vs SMA_20 determines trend direction. Exit triggers on trend reversal (price crosses SMA) or trailing stop breach approximated via ATR expansion. The 15-bar reversal pattern and 20-period trailing stop are operationalized through price-to-moving-average crossover logic and ATR volatility thresholds. The 5% reversal threshold is implemented as stop_loss_pct.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses trend-following principle: ADX_14 > 25 confirms trend presence; price vs SMA_20 determines trend direction. Exit triggers on trend reversal (price crosses SMA) or trailing stop breach approximated via ATR expansion. The 15-bar reversal pattern and 20-period trailing stop are operationalized through price-to-moving-average crossover logic and ATR volatility thresholds. The 5% reversal threshold is implemented as stop_loss_pct.

source_rule_text: A trader should remain in a position and allow profits to run as long as the identified trend continues in the trader's favor, exiting only when the trend direction shifts.
